languages.text: "Как верно подметил мой дражайший коллега, у нас есть обширный опыт столкновений с подобными... недопониманиями".
"As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."
languages.original_text: "Как верно подметил мой дражайший коллега, у нас есть обширный опыт столкновений с подобными... недопониманиями".

traits.locale_text: "As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."
"As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."
"As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."

languages.text: 「私の最も親しい同僚が指摘しているように、私たちは、このような...論点...を、何年にもわたって、何度も遭遇してきました」
languages.original_text: "As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."

traits.locale_text: 「私の最も親しい同僚が指摘しているように、私たちは、このような...論点...を、何年にもわたって、何度も遭遇してきました。」

languages.text: “正如我最亲爱的同僚所指出的，这些年来，我们确实遇到过许多此类……争议点……”
languages.original_text: "As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."

traits.locale_text: “正如我最亲爱的同僚所指出的，这些年来，我们确实遇到过许多此类……争议点……”

languages.text: «Como mi buen colega indica, hemos encontrado diversas... cuestiones problemáticas... a lo largo de los años».
languages.original_text: "As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."

traits.locale_text: «Como mi buen colega indica, hemos encontrado diversas... cuestiones problemáticas... a lo largo de los años».

languages.text: "Wie mein geschätzter Kollege zurecht bemerkt, hatten wir im Laufe der Jahre viele solcher ... Streitpunkte."
languages.original_text: "As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."

traits.locale_text: "Wie mein geschätzter Kollege zurecht bemerkt, hatten wir im Laufe der Jahre viele solcher ... Streitpunkte."

languages.text: « Comme mon cher collègue le fait très justement remarquer, nous avons connu de nombreux... différends de ce genre au fil des ans. »
languages.original_text: "As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."

traits.locale_text: « Comme mon cher collègue le fait très justement remarquer, nous avons connu de nombreux... différends de ce genre au fil des ans. »

languages.text: "Pek değerli meslektaşımın haklı olarak belirttiği üzere yıllar içinde bu tür... Birçok tartışma konusuyla karşılaştık."
languages.original_text: "As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."

traits.locale_text: "Pek değerli meslektaşımın haklı olarak belirttiği üzere yıllar içinde bu tür... Birçok tartışma konusuyla karşılaştık."
